high.summary: Upstream now exposes incremental ThreadHistoryChangeSet projection for changed items, changed turns, and removed turn ids, including coalescing and per-event/per-rollout-item handlers.
evidence: codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/thread_history.rs defines ThreadHistoryItemChange, ThreadHistoryTurnChange, ThreadHistoryChangeSet, and coalescing accumulator
ThreadHistoryBuilder exposes handle_event_with_changes, handle_rollout_item_with_changes, and handle_rollout_items_with_changes

high.summary: Upstream bounds regular in-flight executor RPC calls, reserves cleanup-call capacity, adds call timeouts, drains pending calls on transport close, and propagates W3C trace context.
evidence: codex-rs/exec-server/src/rpc.rs defines request limits, cleanup slots, timeout and limit errors
call_inner registers pending requests with disconnect checks, removes timed-out requests, and emits JSONRPCRequest.trace

high.summary: Upstream expanded realtime conversation structures with output modality, transport/version overrides, typed voices/defaults, audio item ids, response lifecycle events, handoff/noop requests, and conversation item events.
evidence: codex-rs/protocol/src/protocol.rs defines ConversationStartParams transport/version/output fields and RealtimeOutputModality/RealtimeVoice/RealtimeVoicesList
RealtimeEvent includes response lifecycle, ConversationItemAdded/Done, HandoffRequested, and NoopRequested shapes

high.summary: Upstream routes /models discovery through a request-time HTTP client factory and records auth-mode/header/env/agent-identity telemetry.
evidence: ModelsRequestTelemetry emits auth header/env/mode, agent id/task id, request id, cf-ray, and auth error fields

high.summary: Upstream import logic materializes external conversations as rollout items with explicit turn lifecycle, response items, token estimates, imported-session marker, content hash, and title fallback selection.
evidence: codex-rs/external-agent-sessions/src/export.rs reads content SHA, selects title candidates, and emits ImportedExternalAgentSession rollout_items
rollout_items_from_messages emits TurnStarted, UserMessage, ResponseItem, AgentMessage, TokenCount, and TurnComplete records
local_targets: external import rollout schema and marker semantics

high.summary: latest-alpha-cli advanced by concrete Cargo.toml workspace.package.version evidence to 0.144.0-alpha.4 while remaining a distinct channel from main.
evidence: compare main..latest-alpha-cli reports only codex-rs/Cargo.toml changed
